creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Location of tarball has been moved into the archives directory

Fix: 

PATCH_SITES=   ftp://ftp.kame.net/pub/kame/misc/--LSH0BqeWl1LFJRJqbq2o5WSsDWg7kdsVRbVa18B9HjEWvhS2
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Tue Dec 26 10:49:43 2000
+++ Makefile    Tue Dec 26 10:50:46 2000
@@ -8,7 +8,8 @@
 PORTNAME=      netperf
 PORTVERSION=   2.1.3
 CATEGORIES=    benchmarks ipv6
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.cup.hp.com/dist/networking/benchmarks/netperf/
+MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.cup.hp.com/dist/networking/benchmarks/netperf/%SUBDIR%/
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    . archive
 DISTNAME=      netperf-2.1pl3
